entities.name: CHILLI
entities.description: Dry chilli pods (Capsicum annuum L.) including flakes and powder

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: Contamination of dry chilli pods during storage rendering them unsafe for consumption and unfit for trade

entities.name: TRADITIONAL STORAGE METHOD
entities.description: Conventional storage methods resulting in qualitative and quantitative losses

entities.name: PICS TRIPLE BAGS
entities.description: Purdue improved crop storage based triple layer hermetic bags used for safe storage

entities.name: UNTREATED JUTE BAG
entities.description: A type of storage bag used as a control in the study

entities.name: POLYTHENE BAG
entities.description: A type of storage bag used as a control in the study

entities.name: FUNGICIDE TREATED JUTE BAG
entities.description: A type of storage bag treated with fungicide used as a control in the study

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: A fungus that causes aflatoxin infection in chilli pods

entities.name: HYPOXIA
entities.description: Low oxygen condition created inside PICS triple bags

entities.name: HYPERCARBIA
entities.description: High carbon dioxide condition created inside PICS triple bags

entities.name: TEST WEIGHT
entities.description: Weight of 1000 seeds used to measure quantitative loss

entities.name: MOISTURE CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of water present in the chilli pods

entities.name: GERMINATION PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The percentage of seeds that successfully germinate after storage

entities.name: STORAGE PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of storage, specifically 2, 4, and 6 months
